'''âr-m-w-d''' ('''karamwedoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:waller|waller]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-m-w-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:waller|waller]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-m-w-d
|-
! Lemma
| karamwedoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiramwedoko|thiramwedoko]] || [[word:jiramwedoko|jiramwedoko]] || [[word:shiramwedoko|shiramwedoko]] || [[word:kiramwedoko|kiramwedoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuramwedoko|thuthuramwedoko]] || [[word:jujuramwedoko|jujuramwedoko]] || [[word:shushuramwedoko|shushuramwedoko]] || [[word:kukuramwedoko|kukuramwedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoramwedoko|thoramwedoko]] || [[word:joramwedoko|joramwedoko]] || [[word:shoramwedoko|shoramwedoko]] || [[word:koramwedoko|koramwedoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠramwedoko|thĂŠramwedoko]] || [[word:jĂŠramwedoko|jĂŠramwedoko]] || [[word:shĂŠramwedoko|shĂŠramwedoko]] || [[word:kĂŠramwedoko|kĂŠramwedoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
